speech, splendourous body, be an exponent of Shastras, be very intelligent, skillful in writing
and fine arts, be good hearted and will take pleasure in walking, or roaming. Effects of Virgo
189

Ascendant, Seventh Navansa: The native will have a small face, elevated nose, compact
arms, very fair complexion, prominent belly, hands and legs and will have fear for water.
Effects of Virgo Ascendant, Eighth Navansa: The native will be very beautiful, fair in
complexion, tall in stature, will have charming eyes, be fierce, honourable and will have long
and stout arms and brown hair. Effects of Virgo Ascendant, Ninth Navansa: The native will be
famous, will have charming physique, broad eyes, incomparable vigour, be skillful, be with
stooping shoulders and be learned a writer.
56-64. EFFECTS OF NAVANSAS IN LIBRA.
